ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol associated with the recorded prices */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded stock prices */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the recorded date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price after adjustments (for dividends, etc.) */,
  "perc_change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's close */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are quoted */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividends paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol used for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End of the fiscal year */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "reset_token_expires" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reset token */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares bought or sold */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy or sell) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission fees charged */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate if the transaction involves different currencies */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that is being tracked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the watchlist entry was created */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the watchlist is public or private */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the watchlist was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Full name of the market index */,
  "index_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the market index */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year for the index calculation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the index */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded index price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the index on the recorded date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the index on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the index on the recorded date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the index on the recorded date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the index */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* More details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
